ESTABLISHED 2006

Two Decades of Logistics Excellence

Founded in 2006, Lisset Transport Inc has spent nearly 20 years moving North America forward through reliability and innovation.

Our integrated cross-border network ensures seamless freight flow between Canada and the United States, backed by 24/7 real-time tracking, proactive dispatch, and absolute transit compliance.

Who We Are
“

Our Story

What began in Truro, Nova Scotia, as a focused regional transport operation has evolved into a formidable national platform. Over the years, Lisset Transport Inc has systematically expanded its reach, navigating the complexities of North American transportation corridors with a steady commitment to operational integrity.

From our first fleet of vehicles to today's integrated multi-division mobility ecosystem, our journey is defined by the trust of our clients and the dedication of our workforce. We didn't just grow in scale — we grew in technical capability, integrating sophisticated logistics technology to manage cargo, warehousing, and corporate mobility with surgical precision.

Today, we stand as a symbol of North American transport excellence, bridging the gap between demand and delivery across Canada and the United States.

schedule Est. Truro, NS
public Canada & USA

Our Mission

Delivering Dependable Transport Across North America

To deliver dependable transport and mobility solutions through technology, operational excellence, and customer-first service.

We strive to make shipping, supply chain management, and group travel seamless across North America. By combining real-time asset telemetry with rigorous safety protocols, we guarantee the safety of cargo and passengers.

Our Vision

Leading Organized Logistics & Mobility Across North America

To become one of North America's leading organized logistics and mobility platforms.

We aim to pioneer next-generation transit corridors, connecting cities and industries with an eco-conscious, digitally enabled logistics network. Through continuous expansion and service iteration, we seek to redefine North American logistics.

Our Principles

Leading the Future of Cross-Border Transit

At Lisset Transport Inc, our leadership philosophy centers on transparency, absolute reliability, and technological empowerment. We believe that modern logistics requires more than just moving assets; it demands proactive problem-solving and deep partnerships.

Every decision we make—from routing optimization and driver training to our custom tracking systems—is guided by a commitment to safety and efficiency. We foster a collaborative culture where every team member is empowered to act in our clients' best interests, ensuring seamless operations across all North American trans-continental shipping lanes.

Executive Leadership

At Lisset Transport Inc, our mandate extends beyond simple transportation. Since 2006, we have engineered a robust mobility ecosystem designed to empower businesses and individuals alike with precision and scale.

Co-Owner & Executive Director

Fostering long-term customer partnerships and ensuring fleet safety, regulatory compliance, and cargo integrity across all North American trans-continental shipping lanes.

Compliance & Trust

Standards & Certifications

Lisset Transport Inc operates under strict regulatory compliance and safety certifications to guarantee seamless cross-border freight operations.

shield

C-TPAT Certified

Custom-Trade Partnership Against Terrorism certification ensures fast border crossing and secure supply chains.

eco

SmartWay Partner

Active EPA SmartWay partner tracking and reducing carbon emissions to promote eco-conscious transit.

gavel

FMCSA Compliant

Full safety oversight integration with top-tier ratings and ELD compliance tracking on all corridors.

assignment_turned_in

Bonded & Licensed

Licensed bonded carrier status for Canada and US routes, allowing cargo clearance at inland hubs.
